category.scope_note: Portable lithium batteries and power banks (China export to Senegal) compliance comparison.

title.en: China-to-Senegal Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入塞内加尔：合规对照
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入塞內加爾：合規對照

description.en: Source-linked comparison for China to Senegal lithium batteries and power banks, including ASN and NS references, PEC/VoC checks, ARTP for radio, UN 38.3 transport, and importer-led customs readiness.
description.zh: 面向塞内加尔的中国锂电池和移动电源对照，包含ASN及NS依据、PEC或VoC核查、ARTP无线、UN 38.3运输与进口商清关配合。
description.zht: 面向塞內加爾的中國鋰電池和行動電源對照，包含ASN及NS依據、PEC或VoC核查、ARTP無線、UN 38.3運輸與進口商清關配合。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Verify requirements with qualified advisors before export. This page is not legal approval or customs authorization.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。出口前请向合格顾问核实所有要求。该页面不构成法定批准或海关授权。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。出口前請向合格顧問核實所有要求。該頁面不構成法定批准或海關授權。

answer_first.en: For Senegal, the decisive path is importer-led PEC/VoC clearance and local ASN-aligned documentation; CNGB/CCC is useful but does not fully replace Senegal entry requirements.
answer_first.zh: 针对塞内加尔，关键路径是进口商主导的PEC/VoC放行和ASN衔接文件，CNGB/CCC可参考但不足以替代塞内加尔入场。
answer_first.zht: 針對塞內加爾，關鍵路徑是進口商主導的PEC/VoC放行和ASN銜接文件，CNGB/CCC可參考但不足以替代塞內加爾入場。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update on official updates to ASN, PEC/VoC, ARTP, and customs guidance. Keep human_reviewed false until human verification.
